[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person takes a mirror selfie indoors, holding a black smartphone in front of their face while wearing a black puffy jacket.

Main Subject:
A person is centered in the image, facing the camera with their head slightly tilted forward and eyes looking downward. One hand holds a black smartphone covering part of the face on the right side of the frame, while the other hand is raised to the top of their head. The person has dark, medium-length, tousled hair and is wearing a black puffy jacket with a visible front zipper and a high collar, layered over a dark shirt with a white graphic pattern. A wide, metallic-looking belt with a repeating stud-like pattern is visible at the waist, along with additional dark clothing beneath the jacket. The person’s posture is close to the mirror, filling most of the frame from chest to lower torso.

Setting:
The mirror selfie is taken in what appears to be a small indoor room with warm, yellowish lighting. In the background, there are wooden cabinet doors on the left side, and a white countertop or cabinet on the right with various items placed on top. A dark bag or jacket and other household items are visible on surfaces behind the person. The floor in the foreground area shows light-colored tiles with grout lines, and a red patterned fabric or mat is visible near the bottom edge of the frame.

Visual Details:
The camera angle is slightly low and close to the mirror, creating a tight crop of the person’s upper body and waist. The jacket is black and padded with visible seam lines and a glossy fabric texture. The belt appears metallic with evenly spaced studs or raised segments. The lighting creates soft highlights on the jacket and a slight glare on the mirror surface. The background contains mixed colors including wood brown, white, and dark items, with warm indoor illumination.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person posing for a mirror selfie indoors, using a smartphone held close to the face. They wear a black puffy jacket and a studded metallic-looking belt, with a kitchen-like background and tiled floor behind them.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young person with dark, messy, layered hair is taking a mirror selfie in what appears to be a kitchen or utility room. They are wearing a dark, possibly black, bomber jacket with a quilted texture and a zipper down the front. Underneath the jacket, they have on a black t-shirt with a white, intricate graphic design, possibly gothic or band-related. Around their neck, they wear multiple silver chains, one of which is quite thick and layered. On their left wrist, they sport a black studded bracelet with silver spikes. Their pants are dark, likely black jeans, with a prominent studded belt featuring multiple rows of silver pyramid studs. A few small charms or pins are attached to the front of their jeans near the belt. The person is holding a dark-colored smartphone in their right hand, angled to capture the mirror reflection. The background is cluttered, with wooden cabinets visible above, a refrigerator to the right, and a tiled floor. A red and white patterned cloth or blanket is draped over something on the left side of the frame. The lighting is somewhat dim and warm, casting a slight yellow hue, possibly from overhead kitchen lights. The overall mood is casual and somewhat edgy, with a focus on the individual's alternative fashion style. The color palette is dominated by dark tones – black, dark grey, and brown – with accents of silver from the jewelry and studs, and a hint of red from the background cloth.
